title: taraxacum fictum
intro: Taraxacum fictum, commonly known as the false dandelion, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that resembles the real dandelion. It is often used in herbal medicine for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve symptoms of kidney stones, gallstones, and other digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum fictum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum fictum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a treatment for various ailments.
